MODULE: cosmos.evolution.quantum_evolution
FILE: cosmos/evolution/quantum_evolution.py (563 lines)
CATEGORY: evolution

DESCRIPTION: Quantum-Enhanced Evolution for Cosmos Agents
=================================================

Integrates IBM Quantum computing with the existing evolution system
to provide quantum-accelerated genetic algorithms for agent optimization.

This module bridges:
- cosmos/integration/quantum/ibm_quantum

CLASSES:
- QuantumEvolutionResult: Result from quantum-enhanced evolution.
- QuantumEvolutionEngine: Quantum-enhanced evolution engine for agent optimization.

Provides quantum acce
  Methods: async def initialize(self, api_key: str=None) -> bool
  Methods: async def evolve_agent(self, agent_id: str, initial_params: Optional[Dict[str, float]]=None, fitness
  Methods: async def optimize_multi_objective(self, objectives: List[Tuple[str, Callable[[Dict], float], float]
  Methods: def get_evolution_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_quantum_evolution_engine() -> QuantumEvolutionEngine
- async def quantum_evolve_agent_params(agent_id: str, current_params: Optional[Dict[str, float]]=None, generations: int=1
- async def test_quantum_evolution()
